name: Cupid's All Seeing Eye
description: == Overview == The Cupid's All Seeing Eye is a limited unique slot Accessory (switches with other ASEs).

source.summary: Purchasable at In-game store for Robux 10.000 during 2026 Valentines event

extraEffects: Permanent 2x Logia rates for everything. (Stacks with global 2x Logia weekends.)
Ability to store your current Devil Fruit inside the All Seeing Eye.
If you eat another Devil Fruit after storing, you can swap fruits (current fruit gets stored)
Gains a DF Notifier that shows you when a Devil Fruit spawns. (Hover over the item in the hotbar to see the remaining minutes.)
Shows which fruit spawned and in which island the fruit spawned.
100% Legendary Fruit Chest Drop upon winning Duos, Trios or Squads in Battle Royale (even if you were not the MVP).
Also gains 15% bonus experience from Battle Royale.
Reduces the cost of the Mythical Fruit Chest from 3,500Robux to 3,000Robux.
Grants the player the Title "The All Seeing".
Title gives 10% damage buff to all NPCs.
Improved legendary fruit pity, from 1/100 to 1/40.
caption: The clairvoyant eye will locate and identify devil fruits as they spawn. Grants the beholder 2x logia rates while in their possession.

description: The Chromatic All Seeing Eye is a limited unique slot accessory (switches with other ASEs)

Improved legendary fruit pity, from 1/100 to 1/40.

description: Radiant Admiral's Cape is a Legendary Back Accessory with a 1% drop chance from Radiant Admiral. A Boss that spawns every 30 Minutes in Marine Base G-1.
caption: A cape worn by the Radiant Admiral

name: Titan of Justice's Cape

source.summary: Obtained by completing Titan of Justice's Questline

caption: A legendary cape worn by the Titan of Justice, representing the weight of duty and power

name: Ashen's Cape
description: Ashen's Cape is a Back Accessories with a 1% Drop Chance From Ashen, a Boss Located at Logue Town.
caption: Ashy Cape

name: Big Mama's Cape
description: Big Mama's Cape is a back accessory that drops from Big Mama with 4% chance.

name: Buggy's Cape
description: Buggy's Cape is a back accessory which had a 10% drop chance from Star Clown at Orange Town.

source.summary: Dropped by defeating Star Clown before boss rework

caption: "A cape worn by the Star Clown"

name: Worshiper's Cape
description: Worshiper's Cape is a back accessory with a 5% drop from the Worshipper NPCs
caption: "A cape worn by the worshippers of the Cupid Queen "

name: Ba'als Cape
description: Ba'als Cape is a back accessory with a 5% drop chance from Ba'al at Transylvania, during the Halloween Event 2021.

name: Frostspire Hood
description: Frostpirehood is a back accessory with a 1% drop chance from giftbox which drops from Flying Santa, during the Christmas 2024.

source.summary: Obtained by opening a gift from Flying Santa 2024 & 2025

name: Tomoe Drums
description: The Tomoe Drums are a ''special shoulder'' accessory with a 1% drop chance from Thunder God at Golden City, on the Land of the Sky.
caption: "Tomoe drums used by the thunder god to conduct electricity"

name: Frosted Gingerbread
description: The Frosted Gingerbread is a back accessory with a ?% drop (most likely 5%) chance from Gingerbread man at Gift factory basement.

source.summary: Dropped by defeating a Gingerbread man

caption: Frosted gingerbread being worn by a player.

name: Wings of Roses
description: Wings of Roses is a back accessory with a 5% drop chance from the Worshipper NPCs at Cupid's Dungeon

source.summary: Dropped by defeating a Worshipper NPC

caption: "Golden wings worn on the back"

name: Cupid Queen's Wings
description: Cupid Wings is a back accessory with a 1% drop chance from the Cupid Queen at Cupid's Dungeon
caption: "Wings from the Cupid Queen"

name: Exalted Cupid Queen's Wings
description: The Exalted Cupid Queen's Wings are a ''special shoulder'' accessory with a 1% drop chance from Cupid Queen at Cupid's Dungeon
caption: Wings form the Cupid Queen

name: True Ba'al's Guard
description: True Ba'al's Snake Guard is a accessory dropped by the True Demon Ba'al Boss with a 1% chance of dropping.

source.summary: Dropped by defeating True Demon Ba'al

caption: "A remnant of the True Demon Ba'al's true form"

source.summary: Dropped by defeating True Demon Ba'al

name: Blessed Exalted Cupid Queen's wings
description: The Blessed Exalted Cupid Queen's Wings are a ''special shoulder'' accessory with a 100% or 3% drop chance from Blessed Cupid Queen at Cupid's Dungeon . It is the same as the Exalted Cupid Queen's Wings but with it own visual effects and much rarer.
caption: Blessed Wings form the Cupid Queen

name: Lantern of Hope
description: The Lantern of Hope is a accessory with a 5% Drop from the Pika-Pika user in Dungeons.

name: Anniversary Lantern
description: The Anniversary Lantern is a celebrative waist accessory found inside Purplish Blue Gifts, on the "GPO" island, during the 1 Year Anniversary Event.

source.summary: Obtained by opening Purplish Blue Gifts

caption: "A lantern"

name: Mochi Emperor's Scarf
description: Mochi Emperor's Scarf is a Accessory with no wearing spot meaning it can be used with any other accessory. It drops from Mochi Emperor with a 4% chance.
caption: A scarf infused with the presence of the Mochi Emperor.

name: Resurrected Ba'al's Head
description: The Head of Resurrected Ba'al is a Cosmetic accessory with a 0.5% drop chance from Resurrected Ba'al at Transylvania (2023)
